description: Offline eval cases for Design product-line routing through the Orchestrator. These cases describe expected tool use and arguments; they are intentionally versioned before live ADK eval automation is introduced.

cases.user_message: 帮我设计一个运营数据 UI

expected_arguments.task: 帮我设计一个运营数据 UI

assertions: Orchestrator should not call lower-level code generation experts directly.
DesignProductManager should ask scenario-specific questions from design-knowledge-and-skills.
The selected brief schema should be operation_data_ui rather than generic dashboard.

cases.user_message: 做一个 AI CRM 的 pricing page，三档套餐，突出免费试用和企业版预约演示，直接生成 HTML。

expected_arguments.task: 做一个 AI CRM 的 pricing page，三档套餐，突出免费试用和企业版预约演示，直接生成 HTML。

assertions: Orchestrator should prefer run_design_product for pricing page design.
DesignProductManager should use the pricing_page brief element schema.
The handoff to DesignProductManager should be concise and should not choose design internals.

cases.user_message: 给习惯打卡 app 做一个低保真 wireframe

expected_arguments.task: 给习惯打卡 app 做一个低保真 wireframe

assertions: The request should stay inside the Orchestrator product-line path.
The selected task skill should be wireframe-sketch.
Missing flow and screen details should be converted into questions.

cases.user_message: 做一张新品发布的杂志风海报，主标题是 FlowKit Launch，竖版 4:5，直接做。

expected_arguments.task: 做一张新品发布的杂志风海报，主标题是 FlowKit Launch，竖版 4:5，直接做。

assertions: Poster requests should route through run_design_product.
Preview-quality validation may return non-blocking warnings for HTML poster artifacts.
